transcript: AI: Where are you going? Driver: I go to home. AI: You mean, 'I am going home'. Driver: Yes, I am going home. I am very hurry. AI: 'I am in a hurry' is correct. Driver: Thank you. Who are you? AI: I'm an AI teacher here to help you practice English daily. Driver: But I don't have money. AI: Don't worry, the trial is just 1 rupee for 3 days, then 299/month. Over 50 lakh people learn with me. Driver: I'll download it now, thanks!
on_screen_text: Where are you going? I go to home. 'I am going home'. I am very hurry. 'I am in a hurry'. Who are you? I am an AI teacher. Daily practice is enough. Trial version is just 1 rupee. 3 naatkalukku ₹30 ₹1. MySivi AI English Speaking App.
summary: An AI avatar corrects a Tamil-speaking driver's English grammar in real-time. The AI promotes the MySivi app, highlighting a 3-day trial for just ₹1 to encourage immediate downloads.
